description: Prisma Studio update - test file classified as database + config
rationale: Studio.vitest.ts under __tests__/ but not matching test path patterns = database (122 lines). package.json + pnpm-lock = config (13 lines). 2 domains = WARNING.
notes: __tests__/ directory not recognized as test path. This is a FALSE POSITIVE - the file is a test. Known gap: __tests__ pattern missing from scope analysis.
